items.name: Zoioff Campinas 2023

venue.name: [Salas Prontas](http://salasprontas.com.br/)
venue.address: R. Dr. Teodoro Langard, 126 - Bonfim, Campinas - SP, 13070-760

items.information:
## Português

**Note que este campeonato possui APENAS modalidades vendadas.**

* O pagamento da inscrição deve ser feito antecipadamente, todas as instruções se encontram na aba de *inscrever-se* do campeonato.
* A inscrição **NÃO** será aceita até que o pagamento e o comprovante sejam enviados. Sem isso sua inscrição não será aprovada e você não poderá competir.

***A inscrição só será efetivada no site da WCA após a confirmação do pagamento. Assim, as inscrições estarão limitadas aos 16 primeiros pagantes. Caso o número de inscritos exceda este limite, será usada uma lista de espera de acordo com a ordem do pagamento.***

--------------------

## English

**Please note that this competition ONLY has blindfolded events**

* The payment of the registration fee must be made in advance. All the relevant instructions can be found under the *register* tab.
* The registration **WILL NOT** be accepted until the payment is done and the receipt is sent. Otherwise, your registration will not be accepted and you will not be allowed to competed at the day of the competition.

***Registration will only be confirmed at the WCA website after payment confirmation. Thus, registrations will be limited to the first 16 payers. If the number of registrations exceeds this limit, a waiting list will be put in place ordered by de date of payment.***

items.name: Voula Summer Open 2023

venue.name: "Ιωνία" Πολιτιστικό Κέντρο / "Ionia" Caltural Center
venue.address: Λεωφ. Κωνσταντίνου Καραμανλή 113, Βούλα 166 73

items.information:
![](https://www.worldcubeassociation.org/rails/active_storage/blobs/redirect/eyJfcmFpbHMiOnsibWVzc2FnZSI6IkJBaHBBbUUvIiwiZXhwIjpudWxsLCJwdXIiOiJibG9iX2lkIn19--25a11a161841639a3cff2ecfb046c27deb82697e/Cubestore_VSO23_post.jpg)

Το Voula Summer Open 2023 είναι ο 3oς WCA διαγωνισμός στην Ελλάδα για το 2023. Είμαστε περήφανοι για την πορεία μας φέτος και συνεχίζουμε δυναμικά. Στη σειρά διαγωνισμών "Road to Greek Nationals" εστιάζουμε σε κάθε διαγωνισμό σε 2 events που δεν είναι ακόμα πολύ γνωστά στην Ελλάδα. Σε αυτό το διαγωνισμό θέλουμε να φέρουμε στο ελληνικό κοινό τα αγωνίσματα του One Handed/Λύση με ένα χέρι και του Fewest Move Challenge (FMC)/Δοκιμασία λύσης με τις λιγότερες κινήσεις πιο κοντά στους συμμετέχοντες. Ο στόχος μας είναι να διεξαχθεί το πρώτο εθνικό πρωτάθλημα της Ελλάδας προς το τέλος του τρέχοντος έτους. Μέχρι τότε, όλα τα WCA events θα είναι οικεία στους συμμετέχοντες. Πάρτε τους κύβους σας, ετοιμαστείτε, διαβάστε τους κανόνες και ελάτε στην γιορτή του cubing!

Παρακαλoύμε διαβάστε αναλυτικά τις επόμενες σελίδες για να βρείτε όλες τις απαραίτητες πληροφορίες. 

Σημείωση: Για να θεωρείται ολοκληρωμένη μία εγγραφή πρέπει να ολοκληρωθεί το registration στο σελίδα του διαγωνισμού στην WCA **KAI** να γίνει και η πληρωμή του αντιτίμου συμμετοχής με χρήση της τραπεζικής σας κάρτας μέσω της πλατφόρμας πληρωμών stripe που χρησιμοποιεί η WCA, όπως περιγράφεται στις καρτέλες δίπλα. 

[Εγγραφή στη WCA, σε επίσημο διαγωνισμό και πολλά ακόμα. Οδηγός για πρωτάρηδες.](https://youtu.be/RS768gK0Vrg)

The Voula Open 2023 is the third competition this year in Greece. We are proud of our progress and we strongly continue our effort. Grab your cubes, get ready, read the rules, and come to the cubing celebration!
During  each "Road to Greek finals" competition, we focus on 2 events that are not yet very well known in Greece. In this competition we are aiming to bring the events One Handed and Fewest Move Challenge (FMC) closer to the competitors. The goal is to make the first Greek National Championship towards the end of this year. By then, all WCA events will be familiar to the competitors.

Grab your cubes, study the regulations and attend the greek feast of cubing!

Please read the following tabs very carefully!

Note: For a registration to be considered valid, the competitor should both register though the WCA site **AND** pay the registration fee as described in the nexts tabs.
Please read the following tabs in detail to find all the necessary information.

Swisscubing Cup IV ist Teil des Swisscubing Cup 2023. Dieser besteht aus 6 Competitions über das ganze Jahr verteilt. Um mehr darüber zu erfahren, besuche https://swisscubing.ch/swisscubing-cup-2023/.
Teilnehmer die sich registrieren aber nicht bezahlen, müssen die Teilnahmegebühr bei ihrer nächsten Competition in der Schweiz bezahlen.
______________________________________________________________________________________________

Swisscubing Cup IV is part of the Swisscubing Cup 2023, made of 6 competitions during the whole year. Check out on https://swisscubing.ch/swisscubing-cup-2023/ for the details of the other editions.
A competitor who registers and doesn't show up at the competition will have to pay that registration fee at his next competition in Switzerland.

[GE]
გთხოვთ, სახელი და გვარი შეავსოთ ზუსტად ისე როგორც მოცემულია თქვენს პირადობის დამადასტურებელ საბუთში. ინგლისურად შევსებისას, სახელის და გვარის პირველი ასო ჩაწერეთ დიდი ასოებით. პირადობის დამადასტურებელი საბუთი თან იქონიეთ შეჯიბრზე გამოცხადებისას.
სტუმრის რაოდენობა შეზღუდულია (1 მონაწილეს შესაძლებელია თან ახლდეს მაქსიმუმ 1 გულშემატკივარი) - გულშემატკივრის დასწრება უფასოა
ვინც პირველად იღებთ მონაწილეობას აუცილებლად თან იქონიეთ პირადობის ან დაბადების მოწმობა 

[EN]
Please enter your name and surname during registration as it is writter on your ID.
The First letters are capital letters.
Dont forget to have an ID card with you when you come to the competition
Here is Guest limitation (1 guest for each competitor) - its free to attend Guest
First Timer competitors must have ID Card or birthday Certificate

items.name: Zaragoza Open 2023

venue.name: BUAP: Preparatoria 2 de Octubre 1968

items.information:
Estamos muy emocionados de anunciar *Zaragoza Open 2023*  ¡El primer competencia oficial del 2023 en nuestra ciudad! 
Esta competencia es posible gracias al apoyo de la **Preparatoria 2 de Octubre 1968** y el **Puebla Rubik's Team.**

Esta competencia es reconocida como una competencia oficial de la WCA. Por lo tanto, todos los competidores deben estar familiarizados y entender [el reglamento de la WCA](https://www.worldcubeassociation.org/regulations/translations/spanish-american/#2a) antes de la competencia. 

![](https://www.worldcubeassociation.org/rails/active_storage/blobs/redirect/eyJfcmFpbHMiOnsibWVzc2FnZSI6IkJBaHBBbGM0IiwiZXhwIjpudWxsLCJwdXIiOiJibG9iX2lkIn19--d1f46347f050fc703991f2bc01a4b8c12a067f23/zara4.png)


We are so happy to annunce *Zaragoza Open 2023*  The first official competition of this year in our city!.
This competition is possible due to support of **Preparatoria 2 de Octubre 1968** and **Puebla Rubik's Team**.

This competition is recognized as an official World Cube Association competition. Therefore, all competitors must be familiar with the [WCA regulations](https://www.worldcubeassociation.org/regulations/translations/spanish-american/#2a)

items.name: Wiener Frühling 2023

venue.name: [Großer Saal - Pfarre Akkonplatz](https://www.akkonplatz.at/index.php/de/raeume-nutzen/grossersaal)
venue.address: Oeverseestraße 2c, 1150 Wien, Austria
venue.details: Folgen Sie den Schildern, um den Veranstaltungsort zu betreten. / Follow the signs to enter the venue.

items.information:
##### *English version is below*

#### **Deutsch:**

Wir freuen uns sehr euch "Wiener Frühling 2023" als ein offizielles WCA Turnier ankündigen zu können. 

Die Speedcubing Competition wird organisiert von Pranjal Khan, Florian Truckenthanner, David Dinh, Dániel Varga und Felix Strasser und wird delegiert von Bence Barát, Emma Beranová und Viktor Kalmar. Erneut findet das Turnier im großen Saal der Akkonplatz Pfarre statt. Die Resultate dieser Competition werden zu den offiziellen WCA World Rankings hinzugefügt.

Jeder ist bei diesem Turnier gerne willkommen, unabhängig von der Erfahrung, Alter oder sonstigen Fähigkeiten. Manche Events haben ein spezifisches Zeitlimit, damit wir sicherstellen können den ganzen Tag über im Zeitplan zu bleiben. Es dürfen Puzzles jeder Marke verwendet werden solange sie den WCA Richtlinien entsprechen. Es sind alle Herzlich willkommen!

Wir freuen uns besonders auf neue Speedcuber aus Österreich!

-----

#### **English:**

We are happy to announce "Wiener Frühling 2023" as an official WCA Competition. 

The speedcubing competition is organised by Pranjal Khan, Florian Truckenthanner, David Dinh, Dániel Varga, Felix Strasser and is delegated by Bence Barát, Emma Beranová and Viktor Kalmar. The results of the competition will be added to the official WCA World Rankings.

The competition is open to all competitors regardless of experience and skill, but certain event-based time limits will be in place to make sure we can stay on schedule and get through the day on time. No prior experience in WCA competitions is necessary, but competitors must be familiar with the WCA Regulations. Any puzzle brand may be used during the competition, as long as it complies with the WCA regulations.

items.name: The Peponi House Twist & Turn 2023

venue.name: Peponi House Preparatory School
venue.address: Peponi House Preparatory School, Farasi Lane, Nairobi, Kenya

items.information:
Welcome to the third WCA competition in Kenya! 
This competition is specifically created for those who are aged 13 and under. Those who are aged 14 and above can participate... but will not qualify to get a prize on the podium.

Participants should bring some form of identification in order to confirm that they are aged 13 and below. A passport, or a copy of your birth cirtificate is a good example since it shows name, age, nationality and so on.  

You only need to be present at the venue during the events in which you plan to attend. However, you need to be present at the venue no later than 15 minutes before your first event starts so that you have enough time to complete the registration.

🇺🇸 Welcome to the 1st WCA official competition in Angola!

Your registration will only be approved in the WCA website after payment confirmation, which must be made in advance - more information in the [Register](https://www.worldcubeassociation.org/competitions/BrasiliaBigsBlind2023/register) tab. If you have any problem with how to register, take a look at [this video](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=-cJNjPk_J4M).

Please read the [WCA Regulations](https://www.worldcubeassociation.org/regulations) before the competition.

items.name: VID Cubing 2023

venue.address: Hatillo 3, contiguo al Liceo Edgar Cervantes

items.information:
**VID Cubing 2023** 

Es la segunda competencia del nuevo año 2023.

Esta competencia es reconocida como una competencia official de la World Cube Association.
La competencia es abierta a competidores de cualquier nacionalidad, el registro esta habilitado desde la página oficial de la WCA. No es necesario tener experiencia, pero los competidores deben estar conocer los Reglamentos
El acceso a invitados y espectadores será gratuita.
_____
**English version**

**VID Cubing 2023**

Is a second competition of the new year 2023. 

This competition is recognized as an official World Cube Association competition.
The competition is open to all competitors of all nationalities. Registration is available on the WCA website. No experience in WCA competitions is necessary, but competitors should be familiar with the WCA Regulations
The competition is free to spectators and guests.

items.information:
**¡Formá parte de este nuevo torneo!**
Recordá que para participar es obligatorio estar familiarizado con el [Reglamento de la WCA](https://www.worldcubeassociation.org/regulations/translations/spanish-american/)

¡Te necesitamos para seguir fortaleciendo nuestra comunidad! Involucrate con las diferentes tareas que nos ayudan a un torneo exitoso y agradable para todos, ya sea como juez, runner, scrambler, etc. Te dejamos links para más información a continuación:

 *[Reglas basicas sobre cómo competir](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=8O_iWRGq4K8)
 *[Manual WCA para competidores](https://www.worldcubeassociation.org/edudoc/competitor-tutorial/es/tutorial.pdf)
 *[Manual WCA para jueces](https://www.worldcubeassociation.org/edudoc/judge-tutorial/judge-tutorial-es.pdf)

Te esperamos :)

**Be part of this new tournament!**
Remember that to participate it is mandatory to be familiar with the ["WCA Regulations"](https://www.worldcubeassociation.org/regulations/)

We need you to continue strengthening our community! Get involved with the different tasks that help us to have a successful and enjoyable tournament for everyone, be it as a judge, runner, scrambler, etc. We leave you links for more information below:

 *[Basics rules to compete](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=dPL3eV-A0ww)
 *[WCA competitor tutorial](https://www.worldcubeassociation.org/edudoc/competitor-tutorial/tutorial.pdf)
 *[WCA judging tutorial](https://www.worldcubeassociation.org/edudoc/judge-tutorial/judge-tutorial.pdf)

See you there :)

CLUB DE SPEEDCUBING PARAGUAY
Email: speedcubingpy@gmail.com
Facebook: [/cscpy](https://web.facebook.com/cscpy/)
Instagram: [@cscpy](https://www.instagram.com/cscpy/)

items.name: FMC Latin America 2023

venue.name: Multiple Cities
venue.address: Multiple Locations
venue.details: See the locations tab for more information about venue locations

items.information:
*English:*

This competition will hold **only 3x3x3 Fewest Moves event**, and it will be held in multiple locations, across Latin America. Please pay attention to the **date and time zone** of your [location](https://www.worldcubeassociation.org/competitions/FMCLatinAmerica2023#24247-locations-lugares)!

Locations may be added until the 25th of February 23:59UTC so if there isn't a location near you yet contact your local [Delegate](https://www.worldcubeassociation.org/delegates) in Latin America.

---

*Español:*

Esta competencia tendrá **solo el evento 3x3x3 Menos Movimientos**, y se llevará a cabo en múltiples ubicaciones en América Latina. ¡Preste atención a la **fecha y zona horaria** de su [ubicación](https://www.worldcubeassociation.org/competitions/FMCLatinAmerica2023#24247-locations-lugares)!

Se pueden agregar ubicaciones hasta el 25 de febrero a las 23:59 UTC, por lo que si aún no hay una ubicación cerca de usted, comuníquese con su [Delegado](https://www.worldcubeassociation.org/delegates) local en América Latina.

---

*Português:*

Esta competição contará **apenas com a modalidade 3x3x3 Menos Movimentos** e será realizada em vários locais da América Latina. Preste atenção à **data e fuso horário** da sua [localidade](https://www.worldcubeassociation.org/competitions/FMCLatinAmerica2023#24247-locations-lugares)!

Os locais podem ser adicionados até 25 de fevereiro às 23h59 UTC, portanto, se ainda não houver um local próximo a você, entre em contato com o [Delegado](https://www.worldcubeassociation.org/delegates) local na América Latina.

items.name: You Better Belize It 2023

venue.name: [TCC Toledo Community College Auditorium](https://tcc.edu.bz/)
venue.address: TCC (Toledo Community College Auditorium - 454V+3CM, Punta Gorda, BZE

items.information:
**English**

This competition is recognized as an official World Cube Association competition. This is the first competition in Belize.
The competition is open to all competitors of all nationalities. Registration is available on the WCA website. No experience in WCA competitions is necessary, but competitors should be familiar with the WCA [Regulations](https://www.worldcubeassociation.org/regulations/)
The competition is free to spectators and guests.

**Spanish**

Esta competencia es reconocida como una competencia official de la World Cube Association. Esta es la primera competencia oficial en Belice.
La competencia es abierta a competidores de cualquier nacionalidad, El registro esta habilitado desde la página oficial de la WCA. No es necesario tener experiencia, pero los competidores deben estar conocer los [Reglamentos](https://www.worldcubeassociation.org/regulations/)
El acceso a invitados y espectadores será gratuita.

items.name: Oman Open 2023

venue.name: [HORMUZ Grand Muscat hotel](https://www.radissonhotels.com/en-us/hotels/radisson-collection-muscat)
venue.address: Al Matar St Muscat 111, 128, Oman

items.information:
This is the first WCA competition in Oman.
The competition is the national championship of Oman for the year 2023. 
The competition is open to all persons from all countries.

There will be prizes and honours:
- top 3 competitors with the nationality of Oman
- competitors without the nationality of Oman, who finish in top 3 of an event

## Welcome to Yerevan!
We are so excited to announce that the next WCA approved competition in Yerevan.
Please read the tabs attentively before registering.

## Բարի գալուստ Երևան!
Երևանում տեղի կունենա Ռուբիկ կուբիկի հերթական պաշտոնական առաջնությունը։
Գրանցվելուց առաջ անպայման կարդալ տրամադրված տեղեկությունը։

items.information:
Dalyviai, dalyvaujantis tik vienoje rungtyje varžybose dalyvauja nemokamai.
Reguliariai tikrinkite savo elektroninio pašto dėžutę dėl patvirtinimo laiško ir naujos informacijos dėl varžybų.

Competitors competing in only one event participate for free.
Regularly check your email inbox for confirmation email and updates about the competition.
